Links

Nodes in the network. Contact channels and sites worth your time.

Contact

REACH OUT

No social media. No DMs. No algorithms between us. ──────────────────────────────────── email: [ enable javascript ] github: github.com/MarcusGraetsch rss: working-notes.org/feed.xml ──────────────────────────────────── If you have something to say, write an email.

Blogroll

Sites we read, respect, or argue with. No affiliate links. No SEO. Just text worth reading.

FILE DESCRIPTION STATUS
[001] Logic Magazine .......... Tech + politics [002] Chaos Computer Club .......... Hackers with ethics [003] Jacobin .......... Left analysis [004] New Left Review .......... Theory + critique [005] netzpolitik.org .......... Digital rights (DE) [006] Pluralistic (Cory Doctorow) .......... Platform capitalism

This page is a living document. Links may come and go.
